Alya

Luxury Class • 16 Passengers

It is a luxury yacht, with a length of 32 meters and a capacity of 16 passengers, with 9 spacious cabins, most with a private balcony.

Technical Specifications & Safety

Safety Equipment

  • 35 life jackets
  • 4 lifebuoys 9mm
  • Flare gun, smoke signals, SOS flashlights and other types of visual signals
  • 2 survival rafts, 25 passengers each
  • Fire extinguishers 10 lb and 2lb
  • Fire hoses 15m
  • Fire detectors and complete fire protection system

Dimensions

Length31.50 mt2 / 103.34 ft
Beam12.50 mt2 / 41.01 ft
DOWNLOAD FACT SHEET

Deck Plans

Deck Level

UPPER DECK

On the Upper deck we have 4 cabins, the bridge and an Alfresco Area.

Deck 1 of 3

Diving into the Wildlife Wonders and Marine Magic of the Galapagos

5 Days / 4 Nights

DayTimeActivity
THURSDAYAMSanta Cruz Island : Baltra - airport (arrival)
PMSanta Cruz Island : Black Turtle Cove
FRIDAYAMGenovesa Island : Darwin Bay
PMGenovesa Island : Barranco
SATURDAYAMSantiago Island : Sullivan Bay
PMBartolome Island : Pinnacle Rock
SUNDAYAMSantiago Island : Chinese Hat
PMMosquera Islet
MONDAYAMSanta Cruz Island : Charles Darwin Station
PMBaltra Airport (Departure)
